goal: Predict bulk_modulus, density, tg for PSTR (*CC(c1ccccc1)*)
assumptions: PSTR is confidence=medium: temperatures are class-specific (no group-contribution estimation needed); each decision is reasoned against decision_policy.json
PS member: exp Tg=373 K, RT density=1.05 g/cm3, glassy K_T=3.3-4.0 GPa (Mark2007 Table 7.6)
DP=40 (>=30 Tg-convergence floor) is screening-grade for Tg; DP<Me@160 makes K systematically underestimated -> reported screening-grade

uncertainties.name: pcff_ps_tg_transferability
uncertainties.note: No direct PCFF PS Tg validation paper exists. PCFF Class II is validated on PC (Tg 417 vs exp 422 K) and PMMA vinyl backbone (<10%); PS aromatic-pendant vinyl is an analogy. Probe planned, not executed.

uncertainties.name: k_subentanglement_dp
uncertainties.note: aPS Me=16,600 g/mol -> DP@Me=160. At DP=40<<Me, K from Murnaghan/deform is systematically underestimated ~30-50% vs converged value. K reported screening-grade. Accurate K needs DP>=160 dedicated run.

uncertainties.name: hardware_optimum
uncertainties.note: PCFF default kokkos/mpi1/gpu1 kept. directional_probe is on A800/32-core (host mismatch vs RTX6000/18-core) and values_are_benchmarked=false. ~6.4k-atom cell is ~2.1x the 3020-atom probe cell. By_forcefield default retained; D-08 confidence=low.

evidence.claim: PCFF via EMC (Class II). Switched from TraPPE-UA 2026-06-11: UA representation ignores phenyl ring partial charges and pi-dihedral barriers that govern PS Tg (~373 K); no TraPPE-UA PS Tg validation exists in literature. PCFF Class II explicitly parameterizes aromatic C-H charges and cross-terms; validated for PC (Tang2022, PCFF Tg=417K vs exp 422K) and PMMA vinyl backbone (NkepsuMbitou2025, Class II within 10%). Soldera2006 (COMPASS/OPLS) confirms MD can reach PS Tg ~449-484 K raw, WLF-corrected ~373 K. No direct PCFF PS Tg paper found; confidence=medium until confirmed.
supporting validation
supporting validation
supporting validation
supporting validation
supporting validation

alternatives.rejected: United-atom representation omits phenyl ring partial charges and pi-dihedral barriers that govern PS Tg; no TraPPE-UA PS Tg validation exists. Switched away 2026-06-11.
alternatives.known_error: Tg systematically off; ring electrostatics absent

alternatives.rejected: Soldera2006 reaches PS Tg via COMPASS/OPLS but requires WLF correction; PCFF Class II is the supported EMC path with cross-terms.
alternatives.known_error: raw MD Tg 449-484 K, WLF-corrected to ~373 K

evidence.claim: PCFF Class II uses FF-embedded bond-increment charges that explicitly parameterize aromatic C-H partial charges; appropriate for PS phenyl ring without separate QM step.

charge_method_cost: bond-increment charges are embedded in the PCFF force field and assigned by EMC at build time at zero extra QM cost. RESP/AM1-BCC would each require a per-monomer QM single-point (HF/6-31G* or AM1), adding wall-clock and a QM toolchain dependency with no Tg-relevant benefit at screening grade.
RESP (HF/6-31G*) recommended for PS/PSTR ring pi-system polarization; AM1-BCC acceptable fallback. bond-increment is the EMC/PCFF-native default and is sufficient for screening.

alternatives.rejected: Higher fidelity for ring pi polarization but requires QM step; bond-increment is PCFF-native and adequate for screening-grade run.
alternatives.known_error: small charge differences on aromatic C-H

evidence.claim: PPPM required for PSTR: PCFF assigns aromatic ring pi-system partial charges; long-range Coulomb (pppm) is conservative and correct for the phenyl ring. lj/cut acceptable only for purely apolar PHYC/PDIE.

computational_cost: PPPM adds a long-range kspace solve over lj/cut, but at ~6,400 atoms the cost is small and is fully GPU-offloaded by the KOKKOS pcff binary (kspace on GPU, not CPU-serial). The accuracy gain from resolving aromatic ring electrostatics outweighs the modest cost; lj/cut would bias density/energy. Cost is therefore acceptable.

alternatives.rejected: Omits long-range electrostatics of the aromatic ring; only valid for apolar hydrocarbon classes.
alternatives.known_error: energy/density bias from truncated ring charges

evidence.claim: Tg is chain-length independent above DP>=30; DP>=30 required to average atactic tacticity fluctuations (Soldera2006). DP=40 with nchain=10 = ~6,400 all-atom atoms (styrene C8H8 = 16 atoms/monomer).
Experimental PS anchors for validation: Tg=373 K, RT density=1.05 g/cm3, glassy K_T=3.3-4.0 GPa.
DP=40 < DP@Me=160 (aPS Me=16,600 g/mol, Mark2007 Table 25.4): K from Murnaghan/deform underestimated ~30-50% vs converged value. K reported screening-grade; Tg unaffected.

alternatives.rejected: Needed for converged K but exceeds the 48h Tg-sweep budget; out of scope for a screening run.
alternatives.known_error: K would be accurate but cost is prohibitive at screening stage

decisions.choice: murnaghan EOS (NPT pressure series -1000..+1000 atm) at glassy 300 K; deform fallback

evidence.claim: phase_glassy_vs_rubbery: PS exp Tg=373 K >> 300 K, so the mechanical run is in the glassy state. With tg requested, is_glassy is derived from the measured Tg (Tg>300 K); is_glassy_hint=true is the fallback if thermal is skipped. Glassy K is obtained from a Murnaghan EOS fit to a volume-vs-pressure series on npt_prod300.

method_physics_validity: Murnaghan EOS fit over NPT volumes at P in {-1000,-500,0,500,1000} atm yields the isothermal bulk modulus B0 directly from the equilibrium thermodynamic compressibility; no strain-rate artifact (equilibrium method). bm_method=murnaghan, bm_pressures_atm=[-1000,-500,0,500,1000] in decided_params. Born+NVT stiffness was REMOVED pipeline-wide 2026-06-21 (PCFF Class II + PPPM virial/Born term fails parity 3/3); Murnaghan NPT is the validated glassy-K path.

screening-grade caveat: DP=40 << DP@Me=160 (aPS Me=16,600 g/mol). Sub-entanglement K from Murnaghan/deform is systematically underestimated ~30-50% vs the converged value; K is reported screening-grade. exp K_T=3.3-4.0 GPa anchor.
gpu_vs_cpu: Murnaghan pressure points run on the KOKKOS pcff GPU binary (same engine as equil), 1 GPU/run; equilibrium NPT, no special CPU virial requirement.

alternatives.rejected: Retained as fallback only (success_criteria.fallback=deform on the murnaghan stage). Non-equilibrium method; introduces strain-rate dependence (K_deform_rate 1e7/1e6 s^-1) that must be rate-extrapolated. Used if Murnaghan EOS fails to converge.
alternatives.known_error: rate-dependent overestimate of stiffness; needs rate extrapolation

alternatives.rejected: REMOVED pipeline-wide 2026-06-21: PCFF Class II + PPPM Born/virial term failed parity 3/3 runs. No longer a valid mechanical path.

evidence.claim: PCFF (class2 + PPPM) routes to the KOKKOS full-offload binary at mpi=1, 1 GPU/run (kspace on GPU, not CPU-serial). This is the by_forcefield[pcff] default; run-0 parity vs CPU class2 = 0.000% on all energy terms + pressure tensor (2026-06-20).

~6,400-atom cell is <10k -> 1 GPU (small-cell rule). directional_probe recommends kokkos gpu1_mpi1 for pcff (42.8 ns/day) but measured_on A800/32-core (host mismatch vs hardware_policy.host RTX6000/18-core) and values_are_benchmarked=false; cell ~2.1x the 3020-atom probe cell. Treated as hint -> keep by_forcefield default, not a deviation.

alternatives.rejected: Documented PCFF fallback if KOKKOS unavailable; superseded by kokkos full-offload (~7.9x at 1 rank).

findings: Gate verified independently: PSTR confidence=medium -> reasoned (matches plan_mode).
D-01_ff: all 4 criteria evaluated; source_doi + 5 citations; PCFF covers all C/H atom types; alternatives (TraPPE-UA, OPLS/COMPASS) with known_error. OK.
D-02_charges: bond-increment consistent with PCFF; charge_method_cost evaluated; RESP alternative recorded. OK.
D-03_electrostatics: pppm correctly chosen for aromatic ring charges (|q|>0.1e); computational_cost evaluated; lj/cut alternative with known_error. OK.
D-04_system_size: DP=40 >= Tg floor; sub-Me K limitation explicitly acknowledged and K reported screening-grade with DP>=160 alternative. OK.
D-07_property_method: glassy Murnaghan NPT at 300K (primary), deform fallback, Born removed per BORN_MATRIX 2026-06-21; is_glassy from measured Tg. OK.

D-08_hardware: pinned kokkos/gpu1/mpi1 == by_forcefield.pcff default (not a deviation, no staleness probe required); mpi=1 canonical for PCFF kokkos full-offload (kspace on GPU); <10k cell -> 1 GPU; directional_probe consistent; confidence=low set. OK. (decision_policy hardware require clause listing PSTR among UA/TraPPE classes is stale -- PSTR routes to PCFF per polymer_rules + EMC server; UA anti-pattern N/A.)
Dominant uncertainty named (pcff_ps_tg_transferability) with valid literature_anchor probe; secondary hardware_benchmark probe valid. Stages cover all 3 properties; every stage has success_criteria.

Minor (non-blocking): stage 'analyze-tg-multirate' is not enumerated in track_map, but all required fields present and track=thermal is valid and correct (track_map predates the multirate stage). Not a scientific defect.

provenance.revised_reason: PSTR confidence=medium -> reasoned plan. Reasoned all decisions (D-01..D-04, +D-08 hardware); set PS exp anchors (Tg=373, density=1.05); swapped retired born stage -> murnaghan NPT +-1000atm (glassy, Born retired pipeline-wide 2026-06-21); named pcff_ps_tg_transferability as dominant uncertainty (literature_anchor probe). Critic round 1 revise addressed: added D-07_property_method (murnaghan glassy, deform fallback, Born-removed); added computational_cost to D-03 and charge_method_cost to D-02 criteria. No decided_params or stage changes.
